_provenance.notes: Site uses two custom-licensed type families (Sharp Grotesk Semibold for display, Helvetica Now for PANYNJ for body) — these are Port-Authority-licensed brand assets, not generic webfonts. Treat as signal-strong inheritance candidates for any brand-faithful redesign.

site.owner: Port Authority of New York & New Jersey (PANYNJ)
site.title: John F. Kennedy International Airport - JFK Airport
site.description: Welcome to JFK Airport, New York's international gateway. Find flight info, maps, transportation, parking, and traveler tips all in one place.

logo.treatment: Wordmark 'JFK' in deep navy + 'PORT AUTHORITY OF NY & NJ' lockup in a thin-bordered framed mark — co-branded with the parent agency.

foreground.name: panynj-blue
foreground.role: primary brand color — CTAs, link text, headlines, active tab

foreground.name: panynj-deep-blue
foreground.role: primary CTA hover / dark blue ground

palette.summary: Single dominant brand hue (vivid royal blue #0045FF) used heavily for everything from CTAs to plain link text. Three near-white grounds (white + ice-blue tint + mint tint) for section alternation. Yellow advisory and green status. Restrained, utility-led, no decorative accents.

headingFamily.name: Sharp Grotesk Semibold
headingFamily.source: custom licensed; not a free webfont — this is a deliberate brand investment
headingFamily.register: editorial-grade contemporary grotesk; same family used by Adobe brand, Pentagram clients, NYT editorial features

bodyFamily.name: Helvetica Now for PANYNJ
bodyFamily.source: custom-licensed Helvetica Now (Monotype) — PANYNJ has a private cut

scaleAudit.ratio: 1.25–1.3 inside body range, then a heroic jump to 320px hero
scaleAudit.notes: The 320px hero is exceptional — it commits to 'JFK' as a wordmark moment. The remaining scale is well-mannered (16/20/52). H3 switches family from Sharp Grotesk to Helvetica Now — display family is reserved for h1/h2 only, which is a defensible discipline.

borderRadius.summary: Aggressively low radii — the page reads as crisp/architectural, not friendly/rounded. Pills used sparingly for pill-style filters.

shadows.summary: Single soft halo shadow used sparingly. The site is largely shadow-free; depth is encoded by tinted alt grounds, not by elevation.

gradients.found: none in computed style sample (heroes use raster photos, not gradients)

patterns: full-bleed photographic hero with overlay headline
3-column card grid (icon + h3 + description) — used on every IA pillar page
tinted-ground informational band (mint, ice-blue, yellow advisory)
white card with thin border on tinted ground

sectionHeadlines: Welcome to John F. Kennedy International Airport
An entirely new $19B JFK is being constructed
Get your essentials and more at JFK
Discover what JFK has to offer
Find your way to and from the airport
Do Not Accept Rides from Unsolicited Drivers
ctaLabels: Find taxi rates, locations, and rider tips

voice.registerInferred: brand + service-utility hybrid. The hero moments lean editorial-confident ('JFK' at 320px); the body copy is procedural and instructional. The voice is corporate-civic — 'Welcome to John F. Kennedy International Airport' reads more agency than airline. No humor, no warmth signals beyond polite phrasing.

systemComponents._method: cross-page DOM heuristic — header / footer / advisory band detected by repeated structure

header.shape: white background, 32px tall, logo-left + 4 primary nav buttons (Flights / Transportation & Parking / Explore JFK / Dine, Shop, Relax) + accessibility-icon link + search-icon button. Nav links rendered as <button>, not <a> — likely opens a mega-dropdown.

footer.shape: PANYNJ master logo + 14 utility links (Accessibility / Air Cargo / Alerts / Contact / FAQ / Feedback / etc.) + 3 social icons (Facebook / X / WhatsApp).
footer.deployment: site-wide, flat link list (no grouping or visual hierarchy)

constructionAdvisoryBand.instances: 1 confirmed (transportation page); likely site-wide on impacted sections
constructionAdvisoryBand.shape: yellow ground (#FFCD00) + warning icon + paragraph with inline links + 'Learn more →' affordance
constructionAdvisoryBand.deployment: context-bound — surfaces near sections affected by JFK redevelopment
constructionAdvisoryBand.note: JFK is mid-$19B redevelopment until ~2028; this band is editorially load-bearing and will outlive the redesign.

flightSearchModule.shape: tabbed panel (DEPARTURES / ARRIVALS / PARKING) with radio toggle (Destination / Flight Number) + date picker + destination autocomplete + Search CTA
flightSearchModule.deployment: floating over hero on home; inline on /flights page (PARKING tab dropped on /flights)
flightSearchModule.note: This is the conversion centerpiece of the site.

guideToJfkBlock.shape: section h2 'Your Guide to JFK' followed by card grid linking to IA pillar pages

accessibility.imageAltCoverage: POOR — 9 of 10 sampled hero/card images on home have empty alt; logo has descriptive alt only

contrast.panynjBlueOnWhite: #0045FF on #FFFFFF → 4.65:1 (passes WCAG AA normal text, passes AAA only at 18pt+)

performance.imageOversampling: Editorial card images served at 1080×1440 intrinsic but rendered at 312×416 — ~12× oversampled by area. Major perf liability.
performance.lazyLoading: loading=eager on logo only; rest unspecified (browser default)
